title: Dishwasher Door Interlock Switch Compatible for Amica VW80 Series Replacement Safety Lock Mechanism 697690208 Door Latch Control Component
features: Dishwasher Door Monitoring Function – Ensures the dishwasher recognises when the door is fully closed before allowing programme operation, supporting safe and controlled appliance use.
Compatible Replacement Door Switch – Designed as a compatible substitute for failed interlock switches, helping restore reliable door status detection and normal dishwasher operation.
Control System Communication – Provides accurate electrical feedback to the dishwasher control board, supporting correct cycle progression and preventing door-related programme interruption.
Correct Mechanical Interface – Manufactured to align with original mounting points and electrical connectors, ensuring proper integration within supported dishwasher door assemblies.
Amica Model Compatibility – Suitable for Amica dishwasher models including VW80/0, VW80IN/1 and associated reference model numbers as specified.
description: This dishwasher door interlock switch is designed to confirm correct door closure before appliance operation, supporting safe programme activation and consistent dishwasher performance. It plays an essential role in communicating door status to the control system during use. This compatible replacement component is intended for Amica dishwashers experiencing door detection issues, helping restore correct operational behaviour when the original interlock switch has failed or degraded. Suitable for Amica machines with the following model numbers: 1197967, 1197969, VW80/0, VW80IN/1 Key Features Confirms door closure before dishwasher operation Compatible replacement for failed door interlock switches Designed to match original electrical and mounting interfaces Supports reliable programme control and appliance safety Join thousands of engineers and consumers across the globe who trust in Reliapart spares and accessories to get the job done.
